SEARCH

Package io.github.javainvaders

package io.github.javainvaders
  • Class
    Description
    Alien
    Represents one alien enemy on the grid.
    Alien.Bomb
    A bomb droped by an alien.
    Alien.Boss
    The level-3 boss.
    Alien.RadialBomb
    A bomb fired by the boss that travels outward at a fixed angle instead of straight down.
    AlienMoveState
    Tiny bag of mutable alien movement state.
    Game
    Core gameplay class.
    Main
    Entry point for Java Invaders.
    Main.Explosion
    Tiny data class for a timed explosion animation.
    Player
    Represents a player ship.
    Player.Bullet
    A bullet fired by a player ship.
    Save
    Persists and restores game state to/from a local file.
    Score
    Handles score calculation and level bonuses.
    Screen
    Manages all non-gameplay screens: main menu, pause menu, level-complete and game-over.
    Screen.MenuAction
    Actions the main menu can trigger.
    Screen.PauseAction
    Actions the pause menu can trigger.
    Screen.State
    All posible game states.
